name: jai-lsp-scratch
description: All-in-one Jai tooling - language server, formatter, and semantic highlighter.

jaiLspScratch.serverPath.description: Absolute path to a jai-lsp server binary. If empty, the platform binary bundled in the extension's bin/ folder is used.

jaiLspScratch.compilerPath.description: Absolute path to the Jai compiler used for diagnostics (for example, /path/to/jai/bin/jai-macos or C:/path/to/jai.exe). If empty, `jai` is looked up on PATH.

jaiLspScratch.spaceAfterArrayType.description: Formatter: keep a space between an array type marker and its element type (`[..] string`, `[] Tag`, `[4] u8`). When false, the space is removed instead (`[..]string`). Requires a window reload to take effect.
